debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq R
inst✝ : DivisionRing R
h : Fintype R
Z : Subring R := center R
n : ℕ
H : ∃ x y, x ≠ y
h_n : n ≠ 0
q : ℕ := Fintype.card ↥Z
h_card : Fintype.card R = q ^ n
finclassa : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑A.carrier
this✝² : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑{Quotient.out A}.centralizer
fintypea : ConjClasses Rˣ →
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1} :=
  fun A =>
    setFintype
      {A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
this✝¹ :
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
S' : Set (ConjClasses Rˣ) := ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ
this✝ : Fintype ↑S'
S : Finset (ConjClasses Rˣ) := S'.toFinset
n_k : ↑S' → ℕ := sorry
h_R : Fintype.card Rˣ = q ^ n - 1
h_Z : Fintype.card (↥Z)ˣ = q - 1
H1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ x ∈ (ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ).toFinset, x.carrier.toFinset.card
e : ↥(Subgroup.center Rˣ) ≃* (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ := Subgroup.centerUnitsEquivUnitsCenter R
f : (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ ≃ (↥Z)ˣ := Equiv.inv (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ
this : ∀ (A : ↑S'), Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier * (q ^ n_k A - 1) = q ^ n - 1
h1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ A, (q ^ n - 1) / (q ^ n_k A - 1)
hZ : Nonempty ↥Z
hq_pow_pos : ∀ (m : ℕ), 1 ≤ q ^ m
h_n_k_A_dvd : ∀ (A : ↑S'), n_k A ∣ n
hq : q = Fintype.card ↥(center R)
h₁_dvd : eval (↑q) (phi n) ∣ eval (↑q) (X ^ n - 1)
A : ↑S'
hs : A ∈ univ
h_one_neq : 1 ≠ n_k A
⊢ n_k A < n

have hq_gt_one : 1 < q := by

        have hnk_pos : 0 < q ^ n_k A - 1 := by

        have h_pow_lt : q ^ n_k A < q ^ n := by

        have hqnk : 0 < q ^ n_k A - 1 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow _ q hq1 (Nat.pos_of_dvd_of_pos (h_n_k_A_dvd A) (Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr h_n)))

this
_eq_1

refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)) (fun h_eq ↦ ?_)
        have hq_n : 0 < q ^ n - 1 := h_R ▸ Fintype.card_pos
        have h_card_one : Fintype.card (↑A).carrier = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right hq_n (h_eq ▸ this A)
        exact Nat.lt_irrefl 1 (h_card_one ▸ A.2)

have h_qn_pos : 0 < q ^ n - 1 := h_R ▸ Fintype.card_pos
        have h_nk_lt_n_sub : q ^ n_k A - 1 < q ^ n - 1 := by
          rw [← this A]
          exact Nat.lt_mul_of_one_lt_left (Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (this A ▸ h_qn_pos)) A.2
        have hq_gt_one : 1 < q := by
          haveI : Nontrivial ↥Z := ⟨⟨0, 1, Subtype.ne_of_val_ne zero_ne_one⟩⟩
          rw [hq]
          exact Fintype.one_lt_card
        exact (Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_right hq_gt_one).mp (Nat.lt_of_sub_lt_sub (hq_pow_pos (n_k A)) h_nk_lt_n_sub)

have hq1 : 1 < q := Nat.lt_of_sub_pos (h_Z ▸ Fintype.card_pos)
        refine (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)).lt_of_ne (fun h ↦ ?_)
        have hqnk : 0 < q ^ n - 1 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) hq1)
        have : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right hqnk (h ▸ this A)
        exact (ConjClasses.one_lt_card_carrier_iff_noncenter.mpr A.2).ne' this

have hq : 1 < q := by linarith [h_Z, Fintype.card_pos (α := (↥Z)ˣ)]
      have hnk : 0 < n_k A := Nat.pos_of_dvd_of_pos (h_n_k_A_dvd A) (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n)
      have h_qnk_lt : q ^ n_k A < q ^ n := by
        apply Nat.lt_of_sub_lt_sub_right
        rw [← this A]
        exact Nat.lt_mul_of_one_lt_left (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow _ _ hnk hq)) A.2
      exact (Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_right hq).mp h_qnk_lt

have h_nk_le_n : n_k A ≤ n := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)
        have h_nk_ne_n : n_k A ≠ n := by
          intro h_eq
          have h_pos : 0 < q ^ n - 1 := h_R ▸ Fintype.card_pos
          have h_mul_eq := this A
          rw [h_eq] at h_mul_eq
          have h_c_eq_1 : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right h_pos h_mul_eq
          have h_c_gt_1 : 1 < Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier := A.2
          linarith
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne h_nk_le_n h_nk_ne_n

have hq : 1 < q := Nat.lt_of_sub_pos (h_Z ▸ Fintype.card_pos)
        have h_nk_pos : 0 < q ^ n_k A - 1 := by
          have h_qn_pos : 0 < q ^ n - 1 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow n q (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) hq)
          rw [← this A] at h_qn_pos
          exact Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right h_qn_pos
        have h_lt : q ^ n_k A - 1 < q ^ n - 1 := by
          rw [← this A]
          exact Nat.lt_mul_of_one_lt_left h_nk_pos ((ConjClasses.mem_noncenter_iff _).mp A.2)
        exact (pow_lt_pow_iff_right hq).mp (Nat.lt_of_sub_lt_sub h_lt)

refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)) (fun h_nk_eq_n => ?_)
      have hqgt1 : 1 < q := Fintype.one_lt_card_iff.mpr ⟨0, 1, Subtype.ne_of_val_ne zero_ne_one⟩
      have hnz : q ^ n - 1 ≠ 0 :=
        (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow n q (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) hqgt1)).ne'
      have h_card_eq_1 : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier = 1 :=
        Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right hnz (h_nk_eq_n ▸ this A)
      exact (ConjClasses.one_lt_card_carrier_iff_not_mem_center.mpr A.2).ne' h_card_eq_1

have hqn : 0 < q ^ n - 1 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow Fintype.one_lt_card (Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero h_n))
        have hnk : n_k A ≠ n := fun h => by
          have : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right hqn (by rw [h] at this; exact this A)
          exact (ConjClasses.one_lt_card_carrier_iff_mem_noncenter.mpr A.2).ne' this
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)) hnk
